---
title: "Your Turn"
subtitle: "Bringing a second language into your own course"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.prompt-box {
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
  border-left: 4px solid #6c757d;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  margin: 12px 0;
}
.prompt-label {
  font-weight: bold;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  color: #6c757d;
}
.callout-tip {
  border-left: 4px solid #4CAF50;
  background: #f0fff0;
  border-radius: 5px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  margin: 12px 0;
}
.share-box {
  border-left: 4px solid #4A90E2;
  background: #eef6ff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  margin: 16px 0;
}
.box {
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 0.8em 0;
  border-left: 6px solid #94a3b8;
  background: #f8fafc;
  text-align: left;
}
.box-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.75em;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
  opacity: 0.85;
}
.box-tip { background: #ecfdf5; border-left-color: #10b981; }
.box-tip .box-label { color: #047857; }
.box-important { background: #eff6ff; border-left-color: #2563eb; }
.box-important .box-label { color: #1d4ed8; }
.box-warning { background: #fffbeb; border-left-color: #f59e0b; }
.box-warning .box-label { color: #b45309; }
.box-highlight { background: #fff7ed; border-left-color: #f97316; }
.box-highlight .box-label { color: #c2410c; }
</style>
```

## In your groups {background-color="#ffffff"}

Take one course you actually teach and discuss the following points. Add any insightful ideas [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1C7kTMqHfCuPqkcYHEn1o2Q0wMTnGjvkxp2OU0BHMYwo/edit?usp=sharing)!

::: {.box .box-tip}
[1 Where it fits and where it would backfire]{.box-label} Think about places a second language could appear successfully and places it might break.
:::

::: {.box .box-highlight}
[2 Make it concrete]{.box-label} Talk through how you might keep students using AI for translating-to-understand, rather than blind copy and pasting.
:::

::: {.box .box-important}
[3 Share back]{.box-label} When we regroup, we will share any insights we found particularly valuable.
:::
